subject: ResumeDriver: program FP/CSR/V via DM
description: Extend resume_driver.hpp to write f0..f31 via regno_fpr, M-mode CSRs (mstatus 0x300, mepc 0x341, mtvec 0x305, mcause 0x342, mtval 0x343, mscratch 0x340, medeleg 0x302, mideleg 0x303, mip 0x344, mie 0x304, mcycle 0xb00, minstret 0xb02, satp 0x180), PMP CSRs (pmpcfg0/2/.. = 0x3a0..0x3af; pmpaddr0..63 = 0x3b0..0x3ef), and vector CSRs (vstart 0x008, vl 0xc20, vtype 0xc21, vlenb 0xc22). Skip vector data regs initially (DM coverage uncertain). RED test first in resume_driver.test.cpp.
